rationale: GPDE is a tagged-union page-directory-entry whose fields are all primitives (usize/bool) representing architecturally meaningful flags that the spec genuinely constrains; structural equality on primitives is already semantic, so the view mirrors the variant structure 1:1 via a parallel GPDEView enum. No raw pointers, ghost wrappers, or collections appear, so nothing is dropped and no recursive @ projection is needed.
